display.purpose: Landing hero headline — two-line stack, accent on payoff line.

headline.purpose: App page titles and lower landing section headings.

label.purpose: Nav dropdown descriptions, chips, metadata. Sentence case.

shadows.name: nav-dropdown
shadows.purpose: Desktop nav hover dropdown float — functional only, not card default.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Hero sentinel-rise reveal and dialog entrance.

motion.name: hero-reveal-duration
motion.purpose: Headline lines, lead, and CTA stagger (0.12s / 0.26s / 0.38s / 0.58s delays).

motion.name: mesh-blob-drift
motion.purpose: Landing hero mesh blob translate+scale loops.

motion.name: glow-border-spin
motion.purpose: QuoteCtaButton conic border rotation; static gradient when prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: marquee-duration
motion.purpose: Landing trust strip when enabled; static wrap under reduced motion.

components.name: Glow CTA — Get a quote
components.description: Landing header, hero, and mobile drawer primary conversion control.
components.html: Get a quote
components.css: .ds-glow-cta { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 26px; padding: 14px 30px; min-height: 44px; font-family: Geologica, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.045em; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; transition: color 200ms ease-out, opacity 200ms ease-out; } .ds-glow-cta-border { position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 26px; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); pointer-events: none; transition: border-color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-glow-cta-inner { position: relative; z-index: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .ds-glow-cta:hover, .ds-glow-cta:focus-visible { color: #5ca9ff; outline: none; } .ds-glow-cta:hover .ds-glow-cta-border, .ds-glow-cta:focus-visible .ds-glow-cta-border { border-color: rgba(92,169,255,0.28); } .ds-glow-cta:active { opacity: 0.88; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: App conversion actions — protect, connect, inline section CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 44px; padding: 14px 28px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: #298dff; color: #000; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5ca9ff; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Landing Hero Headline
components.description: Two-line centered display with accent on payoff line.
components.html: When the market dropsyou're covered.
components.css: .ds-hero-headline { margin: 0; text-align: center; font-family: Geologica, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(2.75rem, 7vw, 5.5rem); font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.02; letter-spacing: -0.03em; text-wrap: balance; color: #fff; } .ds-hero-line { display: block; } .ds-hero-accent { color: #5ca9ff; }

components.name: Landing Header
components.description: Fixed black bar — logo, nav triggers, glow CTA. No bottom border.
components.html:
SSentinel
How it works
Get a quote
components.css: .ds-landing-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 32px; background: #000; font-family: Geologica, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-landing-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; text-decoration: none; color: #fff; } .ds-landing-mark { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 38px; height: 38px; border-radius: 8px; background: #298dff; color: #000; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-landing-name { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-nav-trigger { padding: 9px 15px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.82); text-decoration: none; transition: background 180ms ease-out, color 180ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-trigger:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); color: #fff; } .ds-glow-cta-compact { font-size: 16px; padding: 14px 28px; }

components.name: Panel Card
components.description: Quote sections, connect wallet state, history rows container.
components.html:
Example · trigger −2%

If price settles below $98,000, you get $1,000.
components.css: .ds-panel { padding: 24px; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #fff; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-panel-label { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 14px; color: #89919f; } .ds-panel-quote { margin: 0; font-family: Geologica, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 3.5vw, 1.75rem); line-height: 1.2; font-weight: 500; } .ds-panel-quote strong { color: #5ca9ff; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Status Chip — Paid
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-chip-paid { color: #7df752; border-color: rgba(125,247,82,0.35); background: transparent; }

components.name: App Tab Nav
components.html: <nav class="ds-tabs" aria-label="App menu"><button type="button" class="ds-tab ds-tab-active" aria-current="page">Cover</button><button type="button" class="ds-tab">History</button><button type="button" class="ds-tab">Wallet</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; gap: 4px; padding: 4px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); } .ds-tab { flex: 1; min-height: 40px; padding: 8px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #89919f; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #fff; } .ds-tab-active { background: #002e6a; color: #fff; } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5ca9ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
Sentinel's landing page is a single full-viewport moment: centered copy over a living blue mesh, one glow CTA, no secondary actions competing for attention. The holder arrives anxious before a volatility event — they need coverage language, not a protocol tour.

The current shipped landing is hero-only. The app shell keeps the flat terminal aesthetic: bordered panels, steel body copy, pill blue buttons. Geometric Geologica headlines carry institutional weight; Manrope keeps disclosures readable.
keyCharacteristics: Full-viewport hero with vertically centered copy block
Animated multi-blob mesh atmosphere on landing hero only
Staggered CSS sentinel-rise reveal on headline, lead, and CTA
Glow CTA as landing conversion control — Get a quote
Flat app surfaces — bordered panels, no card shadows
Crypto-wide landing copy — not BTC-only, not fixed one hour

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Sui blue carries conversion and hero atmosphere. Lime and orange appear only for status semantics — never as decorative section backgrounds.

rules.name: The Mesh-Hero-Only Rule
rules.body: Animated multi-blob mesh gradients live on .landing-hero-bg only. The app shell and lower landing sections stay flat and tonal.

rules.name: The Steel-on-Black Rule
rules.body: Body text uses steel muted. Hero lead uses white at 84% opacity; strong bumps to full white.

rules.name: The Insurance-First Rule
rules.body: Landing hero says you're covered and Get a quote. Protocol terms live in details expanders only on lower sections.

rules.name: The No-Fixed-Duration Rule
rules.body: Never promise a literal one hour on consumer-facing copy. Coverage window is oracle expiry.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No drop shadows on cards, app buttons, or the landing header. Emphasis via color, size, or border.

rules.name: The Vignette-Over-Mesh Rule
rules.body: Every mesh hero ships with a radial + linear vignette so white headline copy stays readable.

rules.name: The Motion-Enhancement Rule
rules.body: Hero text is fully visible before animation runs. prefers-reduced-motion disables mesh drift, glow spin, and reveal blur.

dos: Do lead the landing hero with insurance language — covered, trigger, paid automatically, one tap.
Do use a single primary CTA on the hero — glow Get a quote only.
Do keep mesh animation and text reveal as CSS enhancements with reduced-motion fallbacks.
Do show plain disclosures when lower landing sections are enabled.
Do use sui-blue pill buttons on app conversion paths with 44px minimum touch targets.
Do hide protocol implementation details in For builders expanders.
donts: Don't use cream, sand, or warm off-white page backgrounds.
Don't promise a fixed one hour of coverage on marketing copy.
Don't frame the product as BTC-only on the landing hero.
Don't stack numbered section markers or identical three-card grids across multiple sections.
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe colored borders on cards, or decorative glassmorphism on panels.
Don't extend mesh gradients beyond the landing hero background.
Don't show dUSDC, strike ladders, or vol-surface jargon above the fold.
Don't ship new surfaces in the legacy wireframe style (.wrap, .box, #ccc borders).
